title: Tizowyrm
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Species |image=[[File:Tizowyrm-InvasionRescues2.jpg]] |name=Tizowyrm |designation= |class=[[Worm/Legends|Worm]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' |subspecies= |races= |height= |length= |wingspan= |mass= |skincolor=[[Color/Legends|Brown]][[Invasion: Rescues 2|''Invasion: Rescues'' 2]] |haircolor= |feathers= |eyecolor= |distinctions=*Ability to store large quantities of information *Allow wears to speak and understand [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Language/Legends|languages]] |lifespan= |origin= |habitat= |diet= |language= }} {{Quote|You've learned our language.''"
"''We have our ways, Danni Quee. You will learn.|Danni Quee and Da'Gara, gesturing to his tizowyrm|}} '''Tizowyrms''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small [[Worm/Legends|worms]] [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[alchemist]]s that, when inserted into an [[Ear/Legends|ear]], [[Translator/Legends|translated]] and allowed the wearer to speak [[Alien/Legends|alien]] [[Language/Legends|languages]]. During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], their advance agents used tizowyrms to communicate with the people of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] when completing tasks in preparation for the coming invasion force. Throughout the conflict that followed, the Yuuzhan Vong wore tizowyrms when speaking with the residents of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]]. ==Biology and appearance== {{Quote|The tizowyrm will allow us to comprehend one another.|translated=1|[[Tsalok]], to [[Yuledan]]|}} Tizowyrms were small, [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Worm/Legends|worms]] [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineered]] by [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[alchemist]]s to act as a [[Translator/Legends|translators]] between [[Yuuzhan Vong (language)|their]] [[Language/Legends|language]] and those used by other societies. On one end of their bodies, the tizowyrm had a [[Mouth/Legends|mouth]] encircled by sharp [[Tooth/Legends|teeth]] and several tendrils. Despite their size, tizowyrms were able to store vast quantities of information and transmit to their wearers subliminally. They were used by inserting the worm into an [[Ear/Legends|ear]], where it would burrow in and transmit information through vibrations. Once in place, it allowed the wearer to both understand and speak other languages. Tizowyrms could only be used for a limited time, and if left in too long would grow exhausted and vibrate itself to [[Death/Legends|death]]. When not in use, tizowyrms were kept jars filled with fluid or small coffers. ==Behavior== {{Quote|Bioengineers? Scientists?''"
"''The tizowyrm that translates for me makes no sense from those words. I suspect they are obscene.|Anakin Solo and Vua Rapuung|''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]''}} Due to war-like culture of the Yuuzhan Vong, some terms translated poorly or not at all, even through the use of a tizowyrm.''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' Tizowyrms [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic]] word ''peace'' translated to mean "willing and appropriate submission from the submissive to the conquerer" and did not know the word ''forgive''. Tizowyrm translation of the words ''bioengineer'' and ''[[Scientist/Legends|scientist]]'' made little sense to the [[Warrior caste|warrior]] [[Vua Rapuung]], leading him to conclude the words were obscene. ''Amnesty'' and ''mercy'' also did not translate well through a tizowyrm because the idea that allowing one to escape the destiny of [[Death/Legends|death]] was generous ran contrary to Yuuzhan Vong ideals. The word ''massage'' also was incomprehensible to Yuuzhan Vong when translated by a tizowyrm, becoming something akin to "inflict pain," when in fact it meant the opposite.''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' ==History== {{Quote|Give me Jacen Solo, alive. So that I may give him to the gods.|Tsavong Lah, using a tizowyrm to address the New Republic|}} Advance agents of the Yuuzhan Vong invasion force, such as [[Yomin Carr]] of the [[Praetorite Vong]], used Tizowyrms to communicate with the native species while they carried out their tasks to lay the groundwork for their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]. Once the Yuuzhan Vong forces reached the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], [[Warmaster]] [[Tsavong Lah]] used a tizowyrm to communicate a message demanding the surrender of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Duro/Legends|Duro]]. In the [[Battle of Duro (Yuuzhan Vong War)|battle]] that ensued, Lah suffered a defeat at the hands of the young [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo]]. Following the battle, he used a tizowyrm to express an ultimatum to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], swearing to suspend hostilities if they gave up their "''[[Jeedai]]''" to the invaders and delivered Solo to him alive. ==Behind the scenes== Tizowyrms first appeared in the [[1999]] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'', written by [[R. A. Salvatore]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Vector Prime]]'' {{1st}} *[[Invasion: Rescues 2|''Invasion: Rescues'' 2]] {{1stp}} *[[Invasion: Rescues 3|''Invasion: Rescues'' 3]] {{Imo}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: Balance Point]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory I: Conquest]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Edge of Victory II: Rebirth]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Dark Journey]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines I: Rebel Dream]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Enemy Lines II: Rebel Stand]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: Ylesia]]'' {{C|as translator analog}} *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]'' ==Sources== *''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]'' *''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' *''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' *''[[The New Essential Guide to Weapons and Technology]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' *''[[Galaxy of Intrigue]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Tizowyrm }} [[Category:Creatures of unspecified diet]] [[Category:Species of undefined sentience]] [[Category:Worms]] [[Category:Yuuzhan Vong creatures]]
